Lint Support Linting and Formatting integration for Travetto

Biome is the tool used for linting, formatting, and organizing imports in Typescript and Javascript code. This module provides a unified CLI interface and standard linting patterns. In a new project, the first thing that will need to be done, post installation, is to create the Biome configuration file.

CLI - lint:register

When registration completes, this is the file the linter will use, and any other tooling (e.g. IDEs).

CLI - lint

Once registered, using the linter is as simple as invoking it via the cli: Or pointing your IDE to reference the registered configuration file.
